items.title: [正面] I don't usually drop reviews on a game but I'm so ...
items.summary:
I don't usually drop reviews on a game but I'm so desperate for this game to have more chances, so I'm leaving a review asking people to try it out at least once, especially if you like Slay the Spire/Reverse 1999 type of gameplay/aesthetic.

The English is machine-translated, but it's still serviceable. You can still get the gist of things and sometimes it's even good at points, because it has that dryness type of delivery that gets you in a story like Morimens'. This is truly Eldritch and Lovecraftian, so if you're into that too, try it out! The devs will officially launch English translation project to replace the machine translation, but this may take some time, so there's that.

Everyone in the game is viable if you invest enough time in them and learn their playstyles. The wonky translations sometimes makes it "confusing", but really, you get it anyway with context clues, or sometimes it's really just obvious what it means. I won't harp on it much because it's machine translated so of course it'll be like that. It's the type of game where I'm just glad there's even that option in the first place.

Join the discord or check out the subreddit if something is confusing you, the community here is pretty nice. Surprised that some reviews here are complaining about farming mats, as if that's not what every other gacha game is? Regardless, they make that front easy anyway, especially with the exchanges and the store. Grinding mats won't be everyone's cup of tea, of course, but it is what it is with these live-service gacha games.

The monetization is straightforward and though I whale at a lot of games, I rarely have to swipe in this game because of how linear it is and how much resources they actually give you. In that front, it's really similar to R1999, but more generous. 

This game almost went to EoS but pulled through, so please try it and see for yourself if it sticks.

items.title: [正面] I have more hours on mobile, and I think this game...
items.summary: I have more hours on mobile, and I think this game is great.
